message.thinking:
We need to answer each of the evaluation questions. Provide JSON array of 3 objects. Each object has keys: question (string: "Chapters", "Description", "Structure"), feedback (string), complies (boolean). We need to check if the text lists main sections of the thesis: No. It does not list chapters. So compliance false. Feedback: text does not list sections.

Description: Does the text briefly describe contents of each section? No. So false. Feedback: no description.

Structure: Can it be easily understood what is the general structure of the thesis just from this text? No. So false. Feedback: unclear structure.

Thus all three false. Provide array with objects. Ensure JSON formatting. No extra text.
